title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
